gist.headline: Alchemy in the hive
gist.blurb: A new community game called Alchemica just dropped! Mix elements to craft and discover wild new combinations, all powered by Pollinations AI.
gist.summary: Added Alchemica, a new community-built element-mixing game, to the Pollinations app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now play Alchemica to discover and craft unique AI-generated element combinations.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a game called 'Alchemica' where players mix elements. Visuals should feature alchemy, potions, and mixing elements. The Pollinations bee should be dressed as a little alchemist or wizard, mixing glowing potions in a cozy setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, mixing glowing pastel potions in a lime green (#ecf874) cauldron. Small pixelated elements like fire, water drops, and sparkles float around the cauldron. Soft lavender and cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
